svg.title: ADMIXTURE K=4 bar plot
svg.desc: Stacked bar chart showing inferred ancestry proportions for 100 individuals under a K=4 model. Each vertical bar sums to 1. Individuals are grouped by continental origin: first 25 African (dominated by red), next 25 European (dominated by cobalt), next 20 East Asian (amber), 10 admixed individuals showing visible mixtures of European and East Asian ancestry, and the final 20 South Asian (green). White vertical divider lines separate each group.
svg.text: K=4 ancestry components fit to a 1000 Genomes subset · each column is one person
